query:
SELECT 
  phoneNumber,
  planName,
  serviceType,
  customerName,
  supplierAccount,
  monthlyCost,
  monthlyRevenue,
  status,
  terminationNote,
  archivedAt
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status = 'terminated'
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  phoneNumber,
  planName,
  serviceType,
  customerName,
  supplierAccount,
  monthlyCost,
  monthlyRevenue,
  status,
  terminationNote,
  archivedAt
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status = 'terminated'
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC;
